summary: Iteration 2: 47/47 backend tests pass (gender/age on Worker, translations dict on Job, profile_strength on 9 fields, idempotent Application via Call). Frontend onboarding refactor verified: splash → /onboarding/language (no /role), /role removed, new /onboarding/personal step (name + 3 gender tiles + age 18-70 validation) works, City/Industry/Skills/Experience/Salary/WorkType all flow correctly, lands on /(tabs)/home. Profile screen shows Gender & Age and full Edit screen renders all chip-pickers. JobCard Call button creates application and visually switches to green 'Applied' badge (background rgb(16,185,129)). Job detail page loads /job/{id} with Call to Apply button. Fixed 3 stale '/role' navigations (home.tsx, PortalLayout x2) that would have hit Unmatched Route.

ui_bugs.issue: router.replace('/role') when no worker — /role no longer exists, hits Unmatched Route. FIXED to /onboarding/language.
portal-logout & portal-back routed to nonexistent /role. FIXED to /onboarding/language.

issues: Tab bar items have no tabBarTestID (e.g. tab-home, tab-jobs, tab-activity, tab-profile). Makes Playwright tab navigation brittle. Recommend adding tabBarTestID to each Tabs.Screen.

action_items: (Optional) Add tabBarTestID to each Tabs.Screen in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx so QA can deterministically navigate via testIDs.

Consider hiding Alert-based language picker on web (the RN web Alert renders inline divs that Playwright struggles to click); a custom modal would test more reliably. NOT a functional defect — Alert.alert is correctly used.

Verify Hindi/Kannada job translations render via manual smoke (backend already returns the data and frontend wires jobTranslation util correctly — covered by backend test_iteration2.TestJobTranslations).
critical_code_review_comments: Hard-coded '/role' paths existed in 3 places after /role.tsx removal (home.tsx:60, PortalLayout.tsx:76, PortalLayout.tsx:86). Suggest a grep -rn '/role' guard in CI to prevent regressions.
Splash + index.tsx correctly route only to /onboarding/language, /onboarding/personal, or /(tabs)/home — good fail-safe.

Backend Worker.gender uses Literal[Male|Female|Other] — validated. Age field has no min/max constraint in Pydantic; UI enforces 18-70 but backend will accept any int. Low risk but recommend adding Field(ge=14, le=99).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_rojgaar_api.py (updated TestWorkerCRUD payload to include gender+age so profile_strength==100 with new 9-field rule)
/app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py (new — 13 tests for gender/age + translations + idempotent call-apply)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (onboarding, profile, edit, call→apply all PASS; tab testID gaps minor)

seed_data_creation: None — used random phone numbers per run; backend has auto-seeded jobs which were already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py + test_rojgaar_api.py. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Mock OTP accepts any 4-digit code. Splash routes to /onboarding/language → phone → otp → personal (NEW) → city → industry → skills → experience → salary → work-type → ready → /(tabs)/home. JobCard call testID is `job-call-{job_id}` (NOT `job-card-call-`). Profile logout testID is `logout-btn` (NOT `menu-logout`). Language menu testID `menu-language` opens RN web Alert — Hindi/Kannada chips inside Alert are hard to click in Playwright; consider switching to bottom-sheet modal for testability.
rca_of_issue: The /role.tsx file was removed but 3 other files still referenced it, causing Unmatched Route errors whenever (a) a logged-out user hit a tab URL or (b) the user logged out of business/partner portal. Root cause: incomplete cleanup. Fix: replaced all 3 '/role' references with '/onboarding/language'. Verified by code grep yielding zero remaining '"/role"' occurrences in /app/frontend.
